_notes: Defines user roles and nav access. Each role maps to a login credential in credentials.json. access is an array of nav item ids — only listed items appear in that role's sidebar. navItems defines the full nav bar in order — add/remove/reorder here to change the sidebar for all roles.

_nav_ids.cmd: Dashboards — ZeroOps command centre with live metrics
_nav_ids.inc: Incidents — Active and resolved incident list
_nav_ids.mim: MIM — Major Incident Management command room
_nav_ids.req: Requests — Service request catalogue and queue
_nav_ids.topo: Service Map — Application topology and health
_nav_ids.agents: Agents & KB — Agent definitions and knowledge base
_nav_ids.wf: Workflows — Scenario simulation and pillar demos
_nav_ids.reports: Reports — Monthly value, RCA, SD intelligence, MIM
_nav_ids.chat: AI Assistant — GPT-4o chat with full ZeroOps context

roles.label: L2/L3 Engineer
roles.desc: Monitor incidents, trigger healthchecks, view dashboards and MIM

roles.label: Rapid Response SRE Team
roles.desc: Full access — agents, topology, workflows, knowledge base, AI chat, reports

roles.label: Executive
roles.desc: Command centre and reports — business value and KPI overview
